attributes.action: If workers are generally sick they shouldn’t be punished and put on stage’s
attributes.additional_details: The unfairness of these stages humans get sick,injured,hospitalised etc this is part of a human life to be punished for this baffles me how can ye have been sick to much that you need punishment genuine sickness can not be helped so the worker has no control over this and still get punished for it
attributes.background: When workers are not well enough to work they call in sick when they go back to work they get punished for being sick sometime resulting in losing there job because they haven’t been well a few times things humans can’t help

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do.
